fields.summary: Specifies arguments for creating a font variation from a typeface.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` is a ref struct that holds the parameters needed to clone or
create a font variation from an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface>. It supports specifying
a variation design position, a collection index for TTC fonts, a color palette index,
and per-color palette overrides.

Because it is a ref struct, it cannot be stored in heap-allocated locations or used
in async methods. It does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    PaletteIndex = 0,
};
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("myfont.ttf");
using var varTypeface = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the font within a font collection (TTC) file.
fields.value: The index of the font within the collection. The default is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use from the font.
fields.value: The index of the color palette. The default is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the per-entry color overrides for the selected palette.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values that override individual colors in the palette.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the design position for variable font axes.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the axis positions.
